ddls:
CREATE TABLE "binary_data_packets" (
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet */,
  "message_id" TEXT /* Message ID extracted from the packet */,
  "payload" TEXT /* Raw binary payload of the packet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the packet was received */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Transmission protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP, HTTP) */,
  "packet_length" INTEGER /* Length of the packet in bytes */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the source of the data packet */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the destination of the data packet */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum value for error detection */,
  "encryption_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the packet is encrypted */,
  "retransmission_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the packet has been retransmitted */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the packet (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binary_data_packets_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binary_data_packets_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES message_ids ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binary_data_packets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binary_data_packets_protocol FOREIGN KEY ("protocol") REFERENCES transmission_protocols ("protocol_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_ids" (
  "message_id" TEXT /* Message ID value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the message ID */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., sensor, IoT device) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the message (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elevation_masks" (
  "mask_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mask value */,
  "mask_value" INTEGER /* Value of the elevation mask */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the elevation mask (e.g., Degree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mask_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cnr_masks" (
  "mask_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mask value */,
  "mask_value" INTEGER /* Value of the CNR mask */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the CNR mask (e.g., dB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mask_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Port number used by the protocol */,
  "max_packet_size" INTEGER /* Maximum packet size supported by the protocol */,
  "security_features" TEXT /* Security features supported by the protocol (e.g., SSL, TLS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet with the error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., checksum, syntax) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "retry_attempt" INTEGER /* Number of retry attempts made for the packet */,
  "resolved" TEXT /* Indicates if the error has been resolved (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_errors_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES binary_data_packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing event */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet being processed */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Time when the packet was processed */,
  "processing_node" TEXT /* Identifier for the node that processed the packet */,
  "processing_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the processing in milliseconds */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Result data generated from the processing (e.g., decoded message, analysis report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_processing_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES binary_data_packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., sensor, IoT device) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination */,
  "destination_type" TEXT /* Type of destination (e.g., server, database) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the destination */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the destination (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet related to the log */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., access, encryption, decryption) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed log message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES binary_data_packets ("packet_id")
)
